title: TheArthemys's Armor Helper
description: Keeping an eye on your armor and tool durability is so important. It can save your life!
body:
TheArthemys's Armor Helper

**TheArthemys Armor Helper** is a **_fabric exclusive_** mod that adds a way to\ display your armor/tools durability **at all time** and **precisely**

If you find any issue or just want to hang out, come on the discord!




![TAH Example](https://github.com/TheArthemys/TA_Icons/blob/main/TAH-example.png?raw=true)



![Fabric Only Mod](https://github.com/TheArthemys/TA_Icons/blob/main/fabric-only-banner.png?raw=true) yes the mod was first made in forge but shush 🤫 now it's fabric
